action.reasoning: Observation: First eval succeeded with avg_precision=0.0812 using a simple 5-layer MPNN (300 hidden, no dropout, mean pool only) trained for 2 epochs. The pure-PyTorch pipeline works end-to-end. Analysis: The score is low because the architecture lacks residual connections, uses simplistic message passing (addition instead of concatenation+MLP), has no regularization, and only mean pooling. Standard GNN baselines on ogbg-molpcba typically reach 0.20+ AP with residual connections, concatenated edge features, mean+max pooling, and dropout. Decision: Implement a stronger architecture with (1) residual MPNN layers, (2) concatenation of node+edge features in messages, (3) mean+max global pooling, (4) dropout=0.1, (5) weight decay and cosine LR schedule. Train for 10 epochs to measure improvement and iteration time (~35 min estimated), then submit eval.
